# Matilda Session Targets
*Auto-generated — do not edit manually*
*Updated: 2026-05-14T23:58:31.771Z*

• When Reina picks a spelling game, warm up with 5 words, then ask what one means—like "What does government mean?"

• After spelling practice, try a wrestling word problem together: "If 3 wrestlers each score 2 points, how many total?"

• Ask "What does erosion mean?" or "What is a compass rose?" using words from her homework before we play.

• Keep spelling games short (15 minutes), then let her pick what's next—she knows her focus window best.
